title: Accept and Record Transfusion Requests
description: The system shall accept transfusion requests from medical staff, including patient details and required blood type, and store the request for further processing.
rationale: To ensure that all transfusion requests are properly documented and can be processed efficiently.
business_value: Improves patient safety by ensuring timely and accurate documentation of transfusion requests, reducing errors in medical procedures.

source.description: As a blood bank technician I need to accept and record transfusion requests from medical staff, including patient details and required blood type so that transfusion requests are properly documented and can be processed.

acceptance_criteria: A medical staff submits a transfusion request with patient details and required blood type.
The blood bank technician accepts and records the request.
The request is stored in the system.
preconditions: Medical staff are authorized to submit requests.
postconditions: Request is recorded with accurate patient details and required blood type.
Request is stored for further processing.
functional_constraints: The system must handle concurrent request submissions efficiently.
security_requirements: All patient details are encrypted in transit and at rest.

non_functional_requirements.performance: The system shall respond to request submission within 5 seconds.
non_functional_requirements.availability: The system shall be available 99.9% of the time.
non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system must support up to 100 requests per minute.
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages should be clear and actionable.

edge_cases: Required blood type is invalid or unsupported.

interfaces.name: Transfusion Request Submission API
interfaces.description: Interface for medical staff to submit transfusion requests.

interfaces.name: Transfusion Requests Database
interfaces.description: Storage location for recorded transfusion requests.

test_cases.description: Submit a valid transfusion request with all required details.
test_cases.expected_result: Request is accepted, stored in the database, and marked as pending for processing.

test_cases.description: Attempt to submit a request with missing patient details.
test_cases.expected_result: Error message displayed indicating missing information.
All requests are accepted and stored in the database within 5 seconds.
